name: Do I need a lawyer for my work-related skin disease claim or can I DIY?
description: Recommended for denials or complex proof; contingency basis.[6]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my work-related skin disease claim or can I DIY?

acceptedAnswer.text: Recommended for denials or complex proof; contingency basis.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: DIY possible for simple claims, but a lawyer boosts success for complex ODA cases with denials or disputes.[6] Utah's system favors represented claimants in appeals involving causation fights.[1][6] Key factors: denial history, pre-existing issues, employer resistance. Handle reporting yourself but hire for hearings; contingency fees make it low-risk. Improves outcomes significantly.
